title: Company Names Tribunal decision: Moss Bros Limited
body: "Application number 5136  Applicant Moss Bros Group Limited objected to the name used by Moss Bros Limited under the Companies Act 2006.  This decision was undefended. ‘Undefended’ refers to decisions where there has been no defence in response to the application to the Company Names Tribunal.  Signed order  On the 27 May 2025 the adjudicator hereby gives notice under sections 73(4) and (5) of the Companies Act 2006 that the company name of Moss Bros Limited is changed to 15880498, Ltd. "
